profiles.name: agent-context
profiles.audience: agents and tools reading project context
profiles.securityModel: non-executable source; no raw HTML, hooks, custom blocks, or path traversal

profiles.name: docs
profiles.audience: strict static docs and simple documentation sites
profiles.securityModel: escaped HTML output; safe href/resource policy; strict build checks for pages, links, images, and output collisions

profiles.name: agent-skill
profiles.audience: agents loading native SKILL.md files generated from Lessmark source
profiles.securityModel: non-executable source; generated SKILL.md remains runtime format; scripts stay explicit files
